title: Sequential
text: Sequential The SEQ connector enables you to integrate sequential file access with Uniface. SEQ is the default database connector provided by Uniface on Unix and Linux platforms. Table 1. Connector Feature Description Mnemonic SEQ Supported version For the supported platforms and product versions, see the Platform Availability Matrix . SQL support Not supported. Stored procedures support Not supported. Supported utilities None Related Links DBMS Connector Overview This section provides an overview of supported functionality and limitations for all DBMS connectors. Was this topic helpful?
